lines.value: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Strength, Attacks, Armour
Penetration and Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by this model by 1.

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If this unit begins the game in Strategic Reserves, it can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. If this unit is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting it up on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ RAPTORS

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit Piles In or Consolidates, each model in that unit can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this unit makes a Dark Pact, until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit targets an enemy unit with a melee attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If that enemy unit is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ ACCURSED CULTISTS
■ CHOSEN
■ CULTIST MOB
■ LEGIONARIES

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this unit is leading a unit and contains a DARK APOSTLE model, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly HERETIC ASTARTES unit that is Battle-shocked and within 9" of this unit’s DARK APOSTLE model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of the Fight phase, if this unit contains one or more Dark Disciple models, you can select one of those models and one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit, then roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. That Dark Disciple model is then destroyed.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ ACCURSED CULTISTS
■ CULTIST MOB

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this unit is leading a unit and contains a CULT DEMAGOGUE model, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, in your Command phase, if this unit contains a CULT DEMAGOGUE model, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit can declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced and each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack with a ranged weapon, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll and any or all modifiers to the Ballistic Skill characteristic of that weapon.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ CHOSEN
■ LEGIONARIES
■ POSSESSED

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per phase, when this model is selected to shoot or fight, it can use this ability. If it does, this model’s unit suffers 1 mortal wound and, until the end of the phase, each time this model makes a Psychic Attack, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, when this unit makes a Dark Pact, until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, each time that enemy unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, subtract 1 from the result.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ CHOSEN
■ LEGIONARIES

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model is selected to shoot or fight, after resolving its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks that had the [PSYCHIC] ability. That unit must take a Leadership test: if that test is failed, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ CHAOS TERMINATOR SQUAD

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of your Shooting phase, one PSYKER with this ability can use it. If it does, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to that PSYKER and roll one D6: on a 1, that PSYKER's unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the start of your next Movement phase, each time an attack targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration  characteristic of that attack by 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit destroyed one or more enemy units this phase and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this unit is within range of an objective marker, each time a ranged attack targets this unit, models in this unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

entries.name: Cultist w/ autopistol and brutal assault weapon

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Pistol

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ CHAOS TERMINATOR SQUAD

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, halve the Damage characteristic of that attack.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Leadership tests taken for that unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must make a Battle-shock test.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker  you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ ACCURSED CULTISTS
■ CULTIST MOB
■ NEGAVOLT CULTISTS

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, you can roll one D6: on a 1, this PSYKER’s unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the end of the phase, models in this PSYKER’s unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

■ TRAITOR GUARDSMAN SQUAD

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per turn, while this unit is leading a unit and contains a TRAITOR ENFORCER model, you can target that unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit from your army with that Stratagem this phase. Each time you use this ability, one Bodyguard model in that unit is destroyed.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this unit contains a Traitor Ogryn model, CHARACTER models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If a unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a CULTIST MOB, it can be attached to this unit instead.

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Rapid Fire 1

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: For the purposes of embarking within TRANSPORTS, each Renegade Heavy Weapons Team model counts as two models.

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this unit contains an Ogryn Pack Master model, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for this unit, and each time a Chaos Mauler Hound model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+, do not remove it from play; that destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: For the purposes of embarking within TRANSPORTS, each Renegade Ogryn Brute model counts as one TERMINATOR model.

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Lethal Hits

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an attack is allocated to a model in this unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: For the purposes of embarking within TRANSPORTS, each Renegade Plague Ogryn model counts as one TERMINATOR model.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, you can target that unit with the Insane Bravery Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if another unit from your army has already been targeted with that Stratagem this phase. Each time you use this ability, one Bodyguard model in that unit is destroyed.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model's unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

lines.value: While an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is within 6" of this unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an enemy unit has shot, if one or more models from this unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Horde move. To do so, roll one D6; this unit can move a number of inches up to the result, but this unit must finish that move as close as possible to the nearest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. This unit cannot make a Horde move while it is Battle-shocked.
